name: HMS Chevron (R 51)
events: 18 Jun 1945 HMS Sea Devil (Lt. D.W. Mills, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at Scapa Flow with Chevron (Lt.Cdr. J.F.D. Bush, DSC and 2 Bars, RN).

[Note: this destroyer had not been commissioned as of this date, she had completed construction but was not yet fitted with the new type of control tower due to delays. It had been decided to partially work-up the ship before the control tower was fitted.] (1)
12 Jul 1945 HMS Belfast (Capt. R.M. Dick, CBE, DSC, RN), HMS Sirius (Capt. R.L.M. Edwards, CBE, RN) and Chevron (Lt.Cdr. J.F.D. Bush, DSC and 2 Bars, RN) conducted exercises off Malta. (2)
